title: Information Hiding Techniques Flowchart
description: A flowchart illustrating the major techniques and processes for hiding information within digital files and communications.
relationships: Secret Message is embedded into a Carrier File using a Stego Key to create a steganographic output
Digital Watermarking is a specific application of steganography for copyright protection
Obfuscation techniques transform code/data to hide its purpose
Covert Channels use shared resources to secretly transmit information
